ai_summary: Here's the executive summary:  Commercial Syn Bags Limited (COMSYN) has successfully completed machine testing and commenced the trial run for its expanded manufacturing facility (Unit-Techtex) as of July 15, 2026. This operational milestone is expected to lead to commercial production by July 22, 2026, significantly increasing the company's overall manufacturing capacity and signaling positive growth. No immediate red flags are present, with specific details on the enhanced capacity to be disclosed upon full commercialization.
